```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.65em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.9em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(212,95,71,0.22);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="triangle-alert" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">mode 01</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:0.4em;">Plausible code,<br>wrong assumptions</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Code runs. Shape is right. <strong>Join, group, or filter is wrong.</strong></div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.9em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(212,95,71,0.22);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="quote" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">mode 02</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:0.4em;">Confident summaries<br>of noisy results</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Reads like an abstract. <strong>Confidence not calibrated to evidence.</strong></div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.9em;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.12);border:1px solid rgba(212,95,71,0.22);">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;margin-bottom:0.5em;">
    <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.4em;background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;"><i data-lucide="timer" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">mode 03</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.7em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:0.4em;">Velocity that<br>hides the error</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Errors compound. <strong>By the time you notice, ten cells need re-tracing.</strong></div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;font-style:italic;">
  each one invisible at the moment it happens
 </div>

</div>
```
